rationale: The cited paper is an editorial, journal-level coding analysis of JMR’s topic/method diversity (2013–2019), whereas the citing paper’s core work is an empirical/theoretical study of brand-selfie imagery effects and ML-based measurement. The evidence here is only a single DOI match with no in-text usage snippet, and nothing indicates the editorial is a theory, mechanism, method, benchmark, or direct comparison source for the citing study.
